name: io.github.portofcams/clearspar-part135
description: MCP server that turns Claude into a Part 135 market analyst over John's live Clearspar FAA operator dataset (1,890 active US Part 135 charter operators).

environmentVariables.description: API key for the Clearspar Part 135 data API (the DIGEST_API_KEY value).
environmentVariables.name: CLEARSPAR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the data API. Defaults to https://clearspar.binnacleai.com.
environmentVariables.name: CLEARSPAR_BASE_URL
